case_name: Ohio Gambling Recovery LLC v. Kalshi, Inc.

entries.description: Acknowledgement of receipt of remand order received on 4/3/2026 from Mahoning County Court of Common Pleas. Related document(s) 43. (D,Ju) (Entered: 04/15/2026)
Certified copy of order of remand and docket sheet mailed to Mahoning County Court of Common Pleas with acknowledgment of receipt enclosed. Related document(s) 42 . (D,Ju) (Entered: 03/31/2026)

Order of Remand This Court, having issued its Order granting Plaintiff's Motions to Remand (ECF No. 25 ; ECF No. 29 ), hereby remands this case to the Mahoning County Court of Common Pleas. A certified copy of this Order of Remand shall be mailed by the Clerk of the United States District Court for the Northern District of Ohio to the Clerk of the Mahoning County Court of Common Pleas. Judge Benita Y. Pearson on 3/30/2026. (JLG) (Entered: 03/30/2026)

Order For the reasons set forth herein, Plaintiff's Motions to Remand (ECF No. 25 ; ECF No. 29 ) are granted. The Court remands the removed case to the Mahoning County Court of Common Pleas. Separate Remand Order shall issue. Judge Benita Y. Pearson on 3/30/2026. Related document(s) 39, 40 . (JLG) (Entered: 03/30/2026)

Order [non-document] Without presuming that the Court has subject-matter jurisdiction or that removal was appropriate, Defendants Kalshi Klear Inc., KalshiEX LLC, Kalshi, Inc., Webull Corporation, Kalshi Trading LLC, Kalshi Klear LLC, Robinhood Derivatives LLC, and Robinhood Markets, Inc.'s 27 Consent Motion for Extension of Time until 14 Days after the Court Rules on Plaintiff's Remand Motion to Answer or Otherwise Respond to Complaint is granted as requested. Judge Benita Y. Pearson on 8/29/2025. (JLG)
